hero.name: The Gin Library
hero.tagline: Aachen's hidden speakeasy, where every book holds a story and every glass a hand-picked gin.

about.title: Between the Lines
about.body: Behind an unassuming façade in Aachen's old town hides The Gin Library, an intimate speakeasy bar full of shelves, low light and more than a hundred hand-picked gins. Find the entrance and you step into a world where bar craft meets the quiet of a library, and every drink is told with care.

cocktails.title: Signature Cocktails
cocktails.subtitle: Craft in a glass, from timeless classics to original creations you'll find nowhere else.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.body: Whether a company celebration, team event or exclusive reception, we turn the library into your private space. On request with a bespoke menu, full bar service and an evening shaped entirely around you.

ginTastings.title: Gin Tastings
ginTastings.body: Embark on a guided journey through the world of gin. Taste a curated selection of spirits, discover their botanicals and learn what makes a truly great gin.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Find the entrance and step inside. We recommend reserving ahead, especially on weekends.
